narrative:
## Canopy roadmap

Canopy is the team's working memory: agents propose context through a reconciling gate and humans confirm the consequential changes. The near-term focus is trustworthy capture (staged writes, replay-safe) and the read-side brain (ranked FTS across docs, decisions, feed, and roadmap).

milestones.title: MCP write contract — GA
milestones.description: Typed, staged-only writes for every agent over MCP.

milestones.title: Token rotation & audit log
milestones.description: Constant-time comparison, revoke, and a read trail.

milestones.title: Semantic search ranking
milestones.description: Mixed feed/doc results ordered by meaning, not match.
